strict.rationale_for_score: The summary is factually consistent with the source text and covers the main points (sell-out, venue, date, standings). strict.adjustment_notes: Consistency remains 5 as the summary is factually accurate to the source. Coherence and Relevance remain high (4) as it captures key points logically.
